title: pachypleuria parallela
intro: Pachypleuria parallela, also known as the Chinese polypore, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Thelephoraceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pachypleuria parallela include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
